title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
99acres has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
